test_cases.title: Runtime starts and accepts WebSocket connections
test_cases.description: Verify Runtime starts, accepts WS connections, and responds to ping

test_cases.title: Session create/delete lifecycle
test_cases.description: Verify session CRUD operations route through SessionService correctly
steps: Verify session.created response with valid session object

test_cases.title: Session switch and history retrieval
test_cases.description: Verify session.switch returns history and session.restore works
steps: Verify session.history response with messages array
Send session.list to verify session appears in list

test_cases.title: Session rename updates label
test_cases.description: Verify session.rename persists and broadcasts
steps: Verify session.list broadcast contains new name

test_cases.title: Provider CRUD through ConfigService
test_cases.description: Verify config.getProviders/setProvider/deleteProvider route through ConfigService
steps: Send config.getProviders, verify provider list returned

test_cases.title: Skill CRUD through ConfigService + SkillStore
test_cases.description: Verify skill operations use skill-store.ts instead of config-store.ts

test_cases.title: Agent CRUD through ConfigService + AgentStore
test_cases.description: Verify agent operations use agent-store.ts instead of config-store.ts

test_cases.title: Model list aggregation through ModelService
test_cases.description: Verify model.list uses ModelService.aggregateModels
steps: Ensure at least one provider configured
Verify model list contains models from all providers with correct providerId/providerName

test_cases.title: Model discovery through ModelService
test_cases.description: Verify config.discoverModels uses ModelService.discoverModelsFromApi
steps: Verify config.discoveredModels response (success or error with meaningful message)

test_cases.title: TypeScript compilation passes for Runtime
test_cases.description: Verify tsc --noEmit passes in runtime workspace after all changes
steps: Run: npx tsc --noEmit in runtime directory
Verify exit code 0, no type errors

test_cases.title: PiEvent union type used in event-adapter
test_cases.description: Verify event-adapter translate() uses PiEvent from types.ts, not Record<string,any>
steps: Check event-adapter.ts imports PiEvent from types.ts
Check no 'Record<string, any>' type alias for PiEvent remains

test_cases.title: Dead code fully removed from Runtime
test_cases.description: Verify all dead methods/classes are deleted
steps: Grep rpc-client.ts for approveTool/denyTool/alwaysAllowTool → no match
Grep event-adapter.ts for sendSessionCreated/sendSessionDeleted/sendSessionList/sendProviderList/sendModelList/sendError method defs → no match
Check session-pool.ts is not imported anywhere

test_cases.title: Dead code fully removed from Frontend
test_cases.description: Verify 3 dead composables are deleted

test_cases.title: DI interfaces exist and are used
test_cases.description: Verify all 7 interfaces defined and constructors use them
steps: Check interfaces.ts exports: IRpcClient, IProcessManager, IMessageBroker, IEventAdapter, ISessionService, IConfigService, IModelService
Check server.ts sets services via injection

test_cases.title: server.ts line count under 250
test_cases.description: Verify server.ts is under 250 lines after refactoring

test_cases.title: server.ts does not contain business logic
test_cases.description: Verify server.ts delegates to services, no inline CRUD
steps: Grep server.ts for aggregateModels/discoverModelsFromApi → no match

test_cases.title: message-converter.ts exists with correct exports
test_cases.description: Verify convertPiHistory extracted correctly
steps: Check it imports PiHistoryMessage from types.ts

test_cases.title: System notification factory exists and is used
test_cases.description: Verify createSystemNotification factory function
steps: Grep useChat.ts/App.vue for createSystemNotification import → match
Grep for manual 'crypto.randomUUID() + role: system' pattern → no match in updated files

test_cases.title: useSession and useProvider have refCount protection
test_cases.description: Verify globalListenerRefCount pattern applied
steps: Verify onMounted checks count before registering, onUnmounted decrements

test_cases.title: Full project build passes
test_cases.description: Verify npm run build succeeds for all workspaces
steps: Run: npm run build from project root
Verify no TypeScript or Vite errors
